notes: Executable parity for Shopify's documented `productOptionsCreate(variantStrategy: CREATE)` fanout. The live fixture captures a default-only product where CREATE replaces the default Title option with Color, keeps the original default variant for the first value, creates a second variant for the second value, marks both option values variant-backed, and exposes the same graph on an immediate downstream product read.

expectedDifferences.reason: Product option IDs are allocated independently by Shopify and the local staging identity registry.
Product option value IDs are allocated independently by Shopify and the local staging identity registry.
Product option value IDs are allocated independently by Shopify and the local staging identity registry.
The second CREATE fanout variant is allocated independently by Shopify and the local staging identity registry.
The downstream proxy read returns the locally generated product option ID.
The downstream proxy read returns the locally generated product option value ID.
The downstream proxy read returns the locally generated product option value ID.
The downstream proxy read returns the locally generated second CREATE fanout variant ID.
